transcript: When it comes to mixing drugs, you may think you have a safe approach. But the truth is, your body can react differently every time. Even if you've done them before, using multiple drugs can put extra stress on your heart, making it easier to overdose and stop your breathing. It can even be fatal. Know the risks. Be aware. There is no safe way to mix drugs. For more information, visit cdc.gov slash stopoverdose.
